 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "94882d7c45c1e806",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 04 - merge_into_series"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "622e149558ca490d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "e12a8a84662286b",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:45.129928700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:44.683510600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "53325f59bf129929",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "For better readability of the notebook, we will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style from now on"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "e80d9685a8bcb1d",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:45.148952400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:45.130931700Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "5aef4f1b6f8a4c4c",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:59.828912Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:45.149961Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "data_path = Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\"\n",
    "config = eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516\n",
    "standardized_data_list = eet.read(input_path=str(data_path), config=config)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "28bccbce41008c12",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Step 1: Merge the data into a series"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "e99903702f45a30e",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:01.137078400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:48:59.828912Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "merged_data = eet.merge_into_series(standardized_data_list, time_between_tests_seconds=60)"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "8333f4bae78dd7b5",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:02.106369600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-13T20:49:01.144343400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "merged_data.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=\"Current[A]\", figsize=(20, 5))\n",
    "merged_data.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=\"Voltage[V]\", figsize=(20, 5))"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='Test_Time[s]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},

    },

      ],
